description_long: A muscular adult male stands with arms slightly outstretched, displaying a fit physique and several prominent tattoos on his upper body. He has a short, neatly groomed hairstyle and a full beard, giving him a rugged appearance. His upper body is bare, revealing tattoos on both shoulders, his chest, and a large snake tattoo across his back. He wears athletic shorts and has a bandage or wrap around his right knee and both wrists, suggesting a sports or combat background. His feet are bare, and his posture is upright and alert, as if ready for action. The overall look is that of a fighter or athlete prepared for physical activity in an urban environment.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male with a short hairstyle, beard, and athletic shorts, standing upright with bandaged wrists and knee, barefoot and ready for action.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's muscular chest, tattoos on both shoulders and chest, bandaged wrists, and athletic shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, arm tattoos, and the bandage on his right knee.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a large snake tattoo across his back, the back of his shorts, and the bandage on his right knee.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm and leg muscles, the bandaged knee, and the side profile of his face and torso.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic shorts with wrist and knee wraps
